/usr/bin/clang -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/cpulimit_test.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/cli.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/limit_process.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/limiter.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/list.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_finder.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_group.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_iterator_linux.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_iterator_freebsd.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_iterator_apple.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/process_table.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/signal_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/time_util.c.o CMakeFiles/cpulimit_test.dir/__/src/util.c.o -o cpulimit_test  -lrt
